summary: Iteration 100: Casting Agency System - FULL TESTING COMPLETE. All backend API endpoints tested and working. Frontend page loads correctly with agency info, actors tab, recruits tab, and bonus info card. Production menu shows 'Agenzia' button.
seed_data_creation: Recruited and fired Stefan Weber for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Casting Agency system fully implemented and tested. User has 1 school student (Arjun Reddy) but 0 effective agency actors after cleanup. Agency name is 'Anacapito Studio's Agency'. To test Agency/Market casting choice, need a film or series in 'casting' status.

backend_api_tests.TestAgencyInfo::test_agency_info_returns: PASSED - Agency name, level, max_actors, current_actors, slots_available all correct
backend_api_tests.TestAgencyRecruits::test_recruits_have_g: PASSED - 2 strong genres + 1 adaptable genre per recruit
backend_api_tests.TestAgencyActors::test_list_agency_actor: PASSED - Shows full skills, genres, agency_name
backend_api_tests.TestAgencyFire::test_fire_actor_removes_: PASSED - Actor moved to global pool

frontend_ui_tests.tabs_present: PASSED - 'I miei Attori' and 'Reclute Settimanali' tabs
frontend_ui_tests.recruits_tab_shows_actors: PASSED - 8 recruits with genre badges visible
frontend_ui_tests.actors_tab_shows_recruited_actor: PASSED - Stefan Weber with skills, genres, fire button
frontend_ui_tests.production_menu_agency_button: PASSED - 'Agenzia' button in mobile Produci menu

features_verified.GET /api/agency/info: Returns agency_name, level, max_actors (12 at level 1), current_actors, slots_available, weekly_recruits_count, school_students
features_verified.GET /api/agency/recruits: Returns 8 recruits at level 1 with strong_genres_names (2), adaptable_genre_name (1), already_recruited flag
features_verified.POST /api/agency/recruit: Recruits actor, deducts funds, generates full skills/caps, returns actor details
features_verified.POST /api/agency/recruit (full): Returns 400 with 'Agenzia piena!' message when at max capacity
features_verified.GET /api/agency/actors: Returns recruited actors with full skills, skill_caps, genres, films_worked
features_verified.POST /api/agency/fire/{actor_id}: Removes actor from agency, adds to global people pool
features_verified.GET /api/agency/actors-for-casting: Returns effective_actors + school_students with actor_type field
features_verified.POST /api/agency/cast-for-film/{project_: Endpoint exists, requires project in 'casting' status
features_verified.POST /api/agency/cast-for-series/{series: Endpoint exists, requires series in 'casting' status
features_verified.Frontend /casting-agency page: Shows agency info, actors tab, recruits tab with genre badges
features_verified.Film pipeline casting choice: Agency/Market choice appears when agency has actors AND films in casting status
features_verified.Production menu: 'Agenzia' button accessible from mobile production menu
